turns.user_message: I used to feel so much calmer about things. Now I just feel this low hum of worry all the time.
That constant worry has turned into a tightness in my chest most days. It feels like I'm waiting for something bad to happen.
I'm so on edge that even normal sounds feel like threats. My body is stuck in this exhausting state of high alert.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be. This has been going on for a while.
